title: オークスの後に・主役

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've earned the title of Queen of the Oaks! I'll
keep up this momentum and win the Shuka Sho,
too! After all, I'm the lead star of the Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There may be some who shed tears in my shadow,
but that won't stop me running down the path to
becoming a brilliant princess! Ohohoho!
Ohohoho! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll dazzle on stage at the concert, too! Gaze upon
this Princess☆Uppercut!
